title: Trial by Fire
description: Use the clues to identify the one ingredient that always mixes to neutral with the target ingredient.

hints.text: Find the ingredient whose alchemical is the direct opposite of ingredient 4. Two alchemicals are direct opposites when their mix is always neutral — all three colour aspects have opposite signs.
Ingredient 4 has alchemical properties: R- G- B-. Its direct opposite has all signs flipped. Check which remaining possible alchemicals always mix to neutral with it.
Ingredient 4 = NNN. Its direct opposite is ingredient 7 = PPP.
